commits.message: feat: add activation funnel tracking events to Mixpanel (#30)
commits.author: shalomer

panels.title: feat: add activation funnel tracking events to Mixpanel
panels.scene: A wizard in a tall hat, labeled 'Mixpanel', stares into a crystal ball that shows tiny villagers clicking around on a webpage. The villagers are oblivious. The Knight stands nearby, looking bored.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: The Great Eye watches our every move!

panels.title: feat: add activation funnel tracking events to Mixpanel
panels.scene: The 'Mixpanel' wizard now has a gigantic score counter next to him which increment every time the villagers click around on the webpage. The score is rapidly increasing.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: We're all going to be rich!

panels.title: feat: add activation funnel tracking events to Mixpanel
panels.scene: A royal herald runs down the main street ringing a bell. He is followed by a group of excited townsfolk. The knight is looking in the herald's direction, annoyed.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: Hear Ye, Hear Ye! The Funnel is Activating!

panels.title: 1 commit. 1 feature. 0 bugs.
panels.scene: Knight sitting in a wooden chair, polishing his sword. In the background, villagers are erecting a small, unimpressive stone obelisk. It is slightly crooked. One villager is holding a level against it.
